studies.title: Randomized controlled clinical trial of the efficacy of the digital self-help program edupression.com® in mild-to-moderate unipolar depressive patients

_verification.reason: The study is specifically about the digital therapeutic product edupression.com®, as evidenced by the repeated mention of the product name in the title and full text. The study investigates the efficacy of edupression.com® in treating mild-to-moderate unipolar depressive patients.

_classification.reason: The study is described as a randomized controlled clinical trial, where participants are randomly allocated to either an intervention group receiving the digital self-help program or a control group. This randomization and controlled trial conditions classify it as an RCT.
